title: selaginella urquiolae
intro: Selaginella urquiolae, also known as the "Resurrection Fern", is a type of ancient, rhizomatous, and herbaceous plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella urquiolae include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for optimal health benefits.
